raw_preview.candidate_t2_sql:
PATH=SQL
SQL=SELECT d1.LABELSCAMPAIGN, d2.LABELSSEGMENT 
FROM dim_campaign d1 
INNER JOIN dim_segment d2 ON d1.CAMPAIGNID = d2.SEGMENTBLUEPRINTCLASS 
WHERE d1.NAME = 'Birthday Message' AND d2.NAME = 'Birthday Message'
